name: 0th-skills
description: Lightweight development workflow for solo builders. 5 skills: think, plan, build, debug, ship.

interface.shortDescription: A lightweight build workflow for solo builders
interface.longDescription: Use 0th to turn ideas into decisions, break work into slices, build with TDD, debug from root cause, and ship changes through PRs.
defaultPrompt: Use the think skill to turn this idea into a short decision record.
Use the build skill to implement this change with TDD on a feature branch.
Use the debug skill to investigate the root cause before fixing this failure.
